name: The Altitude
image_sign_text: THE BIG PICTURE. CLARITY FROM ABOVE.
effect: Elevate the conversation to a strategic level. This card is considered visionary.

clauses.name: ALTITUDE CLAUSE
clauses.rule: If a detail is raised: It is considered below the current altitude and tabled.

clauses.name: VISIBILITY EFFECT
clauses.rule: While this card is in play: All ground-level obstacles are considered clouds.

clauses.name: DESCENT OVERRIDE
clauses.rule: If implementation is requested: The meeting is rescheduled.

witness_quote: Let's not get into the weeds.
